name: python3-yaml
title: python3-yaml
summary: YAML parser and emitter for Python3
description:
YAML parser and emitter for Python3
Python3-yaml is a complete YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Python3.  It can
parse all examples from the specification. The parsing algorithm is simple
enough to be a reference for YAML parser implementors. A simple extension API
is also provided.  The package is built using libyaml for improved speed.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-yaml because YAML parser and emitter for Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-yaml as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-yaml with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-yaml --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
